Notes: ESP32 SDA for DDR5 sideband bus; direct 3.3 V lab wiring worked; PCA9306 level shifting remains safer reference
ESP32 SCL for DDR5 sideband bus; direct 3.3 V lab wiring worked; PCA9306 level shifting remains safer reference
Controls optional MOSFET high-side VIN_BULK switch; HIGH = DIMM off; LOW = DIMM on; DIMM VIN_BULK can also be fed directly from stable 5 V or a manual switch
PMIC VR enable / DRAM rail enable; not required for basic SPD/PMIC sideband access; LOW disables switching regulators; released/HIGH enables through pull-up
Useful readiness/wiring indicator; in this lab every PWR_GOOD LOW case traced to wiring/readiness setup, not a confirmed SPD/PMIC failure; do not trust bus results while LOW
Used during ESP32-controlled HSA testing only; preferred bench method is manual HSA strap plus full VIN_BULK cold reset
